profile.who_we_are_p1: PT Geoinhance Solusi Rekayasa is a professional company specializing in geotechnical engineering and civil engineering technology, providing accurate, reliable, and science-based engineering solutions to support safe and sustainable infrastructure development.
profile.who_we_are_p2: We started this business in 2019 and officially established the company in 2025. We act as a strategic technical partner in addressing complex ground and structural challenges. By integrating field experience, advanced numerical analysis, and compliance with national and international standards, Geoinhance ensures that every engineering decision taken is technically precise, efficient, and accountable.
profile.office_desc: Operational management center, Geotechnical Big Data integration, and quality control system for the GeoINHance web application.
profile.vision_desc: To become the most trusted provider of geotechnical engineering and civil technology solutions, delivering safe, innovative, and sustainable infrastructure that meets national and international standards.
profile.mission_desc: Our Strategic Steps and Real Commitment
profile.mission_1: Providing accurate and reliable geotechnical consulting services.
profile.mission_3: Developing competent human resources through training.
profile.mission_4: Conducting high-quality geotechnical investigations & laboratory testing.
profile.mission_5: Building long-term partnerships with clients and stakeholders.
profile.mission_6: Implementing HSE (Health, Safety, an Environment), quality, and anti-bribery management systems.
profile.expertise_p1: GeoINHance possesses strong expertise in advanced geotechnical analysis, including 2D and 3D Finite Element Method (FEM), numerical modeling, seismic response analysis, and ground stability assessments.
profile.expertise_p2: These capabilities allow us to realistically evaluate soil-structure interactions, even on high-risk projects with challenging geological conditions.
profile.approach_p1: We believe that effective engineering solutions must be technically robust, practical, and project-target oriented. Therefore, our services are delivered through an integrated and personalized approach.
profile.approach_p2: The entire process is supported by single-gate communication through a dedicated Project Manager to ensure the highest quality standards, occupational safety, and timely project completion.
profile.commitment_p1: With extensive experience across various infrastructure sectors such as toll roads, bridges, ports, airports, railways, buildings, and energy facilities, GeoINHance is fully committed to being a strategic technical partner through three main pillars:
profile.card_01_desc: Enhancing the quality of engineering decision-making in a precise, accurate, and science-based manner.
profile.card_02_desc: Minimizing construction risks and mitigating complex soil stability and geotechnical issues directly in the field.
profile.card_03_desc: Fully supporting the development of resilient national infrastructure, prioritizing high safety aspects, and long-term sustainability.
profile.commitment_footer: In line with the company's core vision, we continue to strengthen our technical capabilities, human resource development, and technological innovation. This step goes hand in hand with our consistency in implementing Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) principles, environmental protection, and good corporate governance.

home.about_desc: PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa is a strategic technical partner combining field experience with advanced numerical analysis. We deliver accurate, efficient, and accountable science-based engineering solutions to ensure the safety of your infrastructure.
home.serv_1_desc: We will provide a dedicated Project Manager for our valuable clients.
home.serv_2_desc: Providing technical and analytical reports customized based on your project specifications.
home.serv_3_desc: Customize remuneration based on the Company Budget & Government Regulations.
home.serv_4_desc: We always listen and support our clients' needs to provide integrated and flexible solutions.
home.serv_5_desc: We continuously improve our capability and competence so our clients can focus on their business operations.
home.net_desc: Multi-office synergy to ensure fast and efficient technical team mobility across Indonesia's infrastructure corridors.
home.net_jkt_desc: Strategic operational hub for regulatory coordination, SOE partnerships, and national-scale project management.
home.net_bdg_desc: Geotechnical data computing center, structural modeling analysis studio, and main soil mechanics testing laboratory.
home.net_sub_desc: Eastern Indonesia field investigation services, including hydrographic surveys and maritime geophysical mapping.
home.net_bali_desc: Tactical command post handling UAV surveys, infrastructure corridor aerial mapping, and real-time geotechnical monitoring for the new capital (IKN).
home.partners.title: Clients & Strategic Partnerships
home.partners.desc: Trusted by various government agencies, state-owned enterprises (BUMN), and national private corporations in completing strategic infrastructure projects.

profile.legality_desc: PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa is officially established and legally registered under the laws of the Republic of Indonesia.
profile.legal_akta_desc: Officially established before Notary Listiani Nurhasanah, S.H., M.Kn. as a verified Limited Liability Company.
profile.legal_sk_desc: Approved by the Ministry of Law and Human Rights of the Republic of Indonesia with official legalization code.
profile.legal_nib_desc: Official business identification registry ensuring legal clearance for operational and engineering infrastructure projects.
profile.legal_tax_desc: Registered corporate tax account ensuring transparent fiscal accountability and government regulatory obedience.
fem.title: 3D FEM Analysis
fem.description: Portfolio of continuum mechanics modeling using Three-Dimensional Finite Element Method (3D FEM). Focusing on advanced stress-strain simulation, fatigue analysis, and material failure in non-standard structural components.
portfolio.empty: No 3D FEM projects match the filter criteria.
project.1.title: Crack & Fatigue Analysis of Power Plant Turbine Base Plate
project.1.desc: Evaluation of extreme cyclic stress distribution on high-speed turbine engine foundations using 3D solid finite element modeling to predict microcrack initiation.
project.2.title: 3D FEM Blast Load Impact Simulation on Military Storage Facilities
project.2.desc: Analysis of shock wave propagation due to internal blast loads. Modeling includes the non-linear behavior of concrete and steel materials at high strain rates (strain rate effects).
ded.title: Detailed Engineering Design (DED)
ded.description: Portfolio of detailed engineering design for upper and lower structures of massive buildings, including digital modeling, dynamic load calculation, and ready-to-work technical documents.
portfolio.empty_ded: No DED projects match the filter criteria.
project.ded.1.title: Gedung Gelanggang Inovasi Kreativitas (GIK) UGM
project.ded.1.desc: Detailed Engineering Design (DED) for wide-span multi-story superstructures. Analysis focuses on the optimization of iconic steel roof trusses.
project.ded.2.title: PTN Hospital Universitas Hasanuddin
project.ded.2.desc: Preparation of structural engineering details for high-rise healthcare facility buildings. Technical planning includes full ductility of lateral load-resisting systems.
geotech.title: Geotechnical Analysis
geotech.description: Portfolio of comprehensive soil investigation, advanced soil parameter interpretation, settlement analysis, and soft ground improvement planning to ensure infrastructure foundation safety.
portfolio.empty_geotech: No Geotechnical Analysis projects match the filter criteria.
project.geotech.1.title: Soft Soil Improvement Analysis using PVD & Vacuum Consolidation Method
project.geotech.1.desc: Design of consolidation acceleration for soft clay soil using Prefabricated Vertical Drain (PVD) combined with a vacuum pressure system to accelerate settlement in reclamation construction.
project.geotech.2.title: Deep Soil Investigation Interpretation for Skyscraper Buildings
project.geotech.2.desc: Soil stratigraphy evaluation based on correlation of CPTu, N-SPT, and advanced laboratory testing data (Triaxial & Consolidation test) to determine design parameters for large-diameter bored pile foundations.
plaxis.title: Numerical Analysis Plaxis 3D
plaxis.description: Portfolio of advanced geotechnical modeling, 3-dimensional finite element analysis (FEA) for soil-structure interaction, deep excavation slope stability, and deformation behavior of complex foundation systems.
portfolio.empty_plaxis: No Plaxis 3D projects match the filter criteria.
project.plaxis.1.title: Deformation Analysis of Deep Basement Excavation & Secant Pile Stability
project.plaxis.1.desc: Simulation of excavation stages (staged construction) to predict lateral displacement of retaining walls and soil heave effects in dense urban areas.
project.plaxis.2.title: Bored Pile Group Analysis & Bridge Abutment Settlement Effects
project.plaxis.2.desc: Behavior study of pile group foundations under combined axial and lateral loads in thick soft soil layers to evaluate efficiency factors and long-term settlement.
numerical.title: Numerical Modelling Analysis
numerical.description: Portfolio of advanced computer-based simulations for complex physical phenomena, including computational fluid dynamics (CFD), thermal transfer analysis, and multi-physics coupling.
portfolio.empty_numerical: No Numerical Modelling projects match the filter criteria.
project.numerical.1.title: CFD Simulation of Main Dam Spillway Hydraulic Flow
project.numerical.1.desc: Analysis of hydraulic water behavior passing through the spillway channel to map cavitation potential, wall freeboard height, and the efficiency of the stilling basin in dissipating water kinetic energy.
project.numerical.2.title: Thermal Stress & Heat Transfer Analysis of Refinery Distillation Pipelines
project.numerical.2.desc: Numerical coupled modeling (coupled thermal-structural analysis) to evaluate thermal expansion and residual stress on high-temperature fluid piping systems to prevent fatigue failure.
review.title: Review Design Analysis
review.description: Portfolio of forensic audits, third-party independent evaluations, and structural residual load capacity assessments on existing buildings and infrastructure to guarantee long-term operational feasibility.
portfolio.empty_review: No Review Design projects match the filter criteria.
project.review.1.title: Forensic Audit & Load Capacity Design Review of Office Tower
project.review.1.desc: A comprehensive independent post-construction assessment to verify the capacity of existing beam-column elements against the latest seismic regulation updates of SNI 1726.
project.review.2.title: Third-Party Peer Review of Steel Truss Arch Bridge
project.review.2.desc: Parallel computing review using finite element modeling to analyze critical deflection points and hanger cable tension for a 120-meter span bridge.
slope.title: Slope Stability Analysis
slope.description: Portfolio of stability analysis for natural and engineered slopes, design of soil reinforcement systems (soil nailing, retaining walls, geosynthetics), and landslide risk mitigation simulations on critical infrastructure.
portfolio.empty_slope: No Slope Stability projects match the filter criteria.
project.slope.1.title: Slope Stability Analysis & Soil Nailing Reinforcement Design for Toll Road
project.slope.1.desc: Design of a retaining wall combined with a soil nail anchor network to stabilize critical slopes at toll bridge approaches after massive deformation.
project.slope.2.title: Mechanical Retaining Wall (MSE Wall) Design & Slope Safety Factor Evaluation
project.slope.2.desc: Stability analysis of vertical embankment slopes using geogrid reinforcement (Mechanically Stabilized Earth Wall) to verify internal and external Factor of Safety (FoS) values.
structural.title: Structural Analysis
structural.description: Portfolio of advanced numerical modeling, linear & non-linear analysis (P-Delta, Pushover, Time History), and finite element analysis (FEA) to verify structural safety and material efficiency.
portfolio.empty_structural: No Structural Analysis projects match the filter criteria.
project.structural.1.title: Non-Linear Seismic Analysis (Pushover) of a 25-Story Apartment Tower
project.structural.1.desc: Simulation of progressive collapse in reinforced concrete structures to map plastic hinge distribution and building deformation capacity curves during strong earthquakes.
project.structural.2.title: Reliability Evaluation & Finite Element Analysis (FEA) of Stadium Roof Truss
project.structural.2.desc: Micro-element analysis using solid modeling to evaluate stress concentrations at bolt connections of node plates for extreme long-span roofs.
footer.desc: Providing world-class engineering and geotechnical consulting services with high integrity and accuracy throughout Indonesia.
